	Return 
// 0x2bba: ProcessType[[]uintptr]
	ProcessSlice 99 00 00 00 08 00 00 00 
	Return 
// 0x2bc4: ProcessType[error]
	ProcessGoInterface 
	Return 
// 0x2bc6: ProcessType[go.shape.string]
	ProcessString c2 00 00 00 
	Return

	Return 
// 0x2bd8: ProcessType[groupReference<string,int>]

// 0x2bf0: ProcessType[groupReference<uint8,map[int]main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]

	Return 
// 0x2bfc: ProcessType[main.condFields]
	IncrementOutputOffset 38 00 00 00 
	Call cf 2d 00 00 // ProcessType[string]
	Return 
// 0x2c07: ProcessType[main.lenFields]
	Call cf 2d 00 00 // ProcessType[string]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 6c 2b 00 00 // ProcessType[[]int]
